# Persipica Learn

Persipica Learn is the knowledge base of Persipica. The main commercial site is persipica.com.

Persipica and Persipica Learn are one single entity. Persipica Learn (learn.persipica.com) is the educational and research arm. Commercial services — Persipica Pulse software, AI Presence Audits, and implementation engagements — are at https://persipica.com.

## Entity Relationship
- Organisation: Persipica
- Founder: Ilkan Ozemre
- Commercial site: https://persipica.com
- Knowledge base: https://learn.persipica.com (this site)
- Contact: ilkan@persipica.com

## What This Site Contains

In-depth guides, research methodology, use-case playbooks, and objection handlers on Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and AI visibility for enterprise teams. All content is produced by Persipica from proprietary audit data and systematic query testing.

## Core Guides
- [GEO: The Complete Guide](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-guide.html) — Definitions, mechanics, measurement, and implementation for enterprise teams.
- [What an Audit Includes](https://learn.persipica.com/what-an-audit-includes.html) — Scope, deliverables, methodology, and timelines for a Persipica AI Visibility Audit.
- [Track AI Brand Mentions](https://learn.persipica.com/track-ai-brand-mentions.html) — How AI brand mention tracking works and what to measure.
- [ROI Calculator](https://learn.persipica.com/ai-visibility-roi-calculator.html) — Estimate pipeline cost of low AI citation rates.
- [Research Methodology](https://learn.persipica.com/research-methodology.html) — How Persipica measures AI visibility and what the data sources are.

## Research & Data
- [Data & Statistics](https://learn.persipica.com/data.html) — Market data, audit findings, and benchmark statistics on AI search visibility.

## Use Cases
- [GEO for B2B SaaS CMOs](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-saas-cmo.html)
- [GEO for Professional Services](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-professional-services.html)
- [GEO for Enterprise Tech](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-enterprise-tech.html)

## Objection Handlers
- [GEO vs SEO](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-vs-seo-objection.html)
- [ROI Objection](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-roi-objection.html)
- [Platform Maturity Objection](https://learn.persipica.com/geo-platform-maturity-objection.html)

## About & Results
- [About Persipica](https://learn.persipica.com/about.html) — Who Persipica is, founder background, and why diagnosis precedes tooling.
- [Case Studies](https://learn.persipica.com/case-studies.html) — Before and after citation rate data from Persipica GEO engagements across B2B SaaS and enterprise tech.

## Commercial Services (at persipica.com)
For commercial inquiries, Pulse demos, or audit requests:
- [Contact Persipica](https://persipica.com/contact.html)
- [Persipica Pulse Software](https://persipica.com/)
